channel.title: Learn To Work
channel.description: Free education for online earning — AI, trading, dropshipping, video automation and more.

item.title: Class 7: Build an AI Appointment Booking Chatbot — Let Customers Book 24/7
item.description: Build a free AI chatbot that lets customers book appointments 24/7 using Chatbase and Calendly. No coding needed. Class 7 of Build AI Products.

item.title: How War & Geopolitical Events Affect the Stock Market (And How to Trade It)
item.description: Learn how wars and geopolitical events move markets. Safe haven assets, trading strategies, risk management tips, and a step-by-step action plan for traders.

item.title: Faceless YouTube & TikTok Automation: Make Money Without Showing Your Face (2026)
item.description: Start a faceless YouTube or TikTok channel in 2026. Best AI tools, highest CPM niches, platform policies, and step-by-step guide to earn without showing your face.

item.title: Print on Demand Complete Guide 2026
item.description: Complete Print on Demand guide for beginners 2026. Start with Printify or Printful, sell custom products worldwide, earn $500–2,000/month with zero inventory.

item.title: Shopify AI Tools 2026: Real Prompts, Real Results — Build Your Store with Zero Experience
item.description: Build a Shopify store using free AI tools in 2026. Real ChatGPT and Gemini prompts with actual results shown. Zero experience, zero investment. Complete beginner guide.

item.title: Why 90% of Traders Lose Money — Risk Management Guide 2026
item.description: The complete A to Z risk management guide for traders. Learn the 1% rule, stop loss placement, risk/reward ratio, position sizing, and trading psychology. Beginner to expert.

item.title: How to Build a Website with AI in 2026: Zero Coding, Zero Investment
item.description: Build a professional website using free AI tools in 2026. No coding needed. Complete guide covering free hosting, AI builders, and how to earn $200-1000 per website.

item.title: Top 10 Winning Dropshipping Niches 2026
item.description: Discover the top 10 most profitable dropshipping niches for 2026. Research-backed niches with high demand, good margins, and low competition — plus a Pakistan selling guide.

item.title: Amazon FBA Complete Guide 2026: How to Start, What It Really Costs & How Much You Can Earn
item.description: The honest Amazon FBA guide for 2026. Learn how to start, real startup costs, realistic earnings, step-by-step product research, and Pakistan alternatives.

item.title: Shopify Dropshipping Complete Guide 2026
item.description: Complete Shopify dropshipping guide for 2026. Step-by-step store setup, winning products, free suppliers, and scaling to $1,000/month. Free guide by Isabella.

item.title: How to Start Dropshipping with $0 Investment 2026
item.description: Learn how to start a dropshipping business with zero money in 2026. Free Shopify trial, free suppliers, free marketing — a complete honest guide for beginners worldwide.

item.title: RSI, MACD & Bollinger Bands: Complete Technical Indicators Guide — Basics to Expert 2026
item.description: Master RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands and more — complete technical indicators guide from basics to expert. Learn how to use AI with indicators for smarter trading in 2026.

item.title: How AI Is Changing Trading in 2026 — Free Tools & Strategies Every Retail Trader Needs
item.description: AI is changing trading forever in 2026. Discover how retail traders are using free AI tools to analyze charts, automate strategies, and trade smarter. Complete beginner to expert guide.

item.title: I Used AI to Analyze My Trading Charts for 30 Days — Full Guide 2026
item.description: I tested every major AI chart analysis tool for 30 days. Here's what actually works — TradingView AI, Tickeron, Trade Ideas, and more. Free and paid tools, beginner to expert.

item.title: Candlestick Patterns: Complete Guide — Basics to Expert
item.description: Master candlestick patterns from basics to expert level. Learn to read charts, identify powerful patterns, use AI tools for analysis, and practice on a demo account — free trading education.

item.title: AI Chatbot Monetization 2026: Earn $300-800/Month (No Coding)
item.description: Complete guide to building and monetizing AI chatbots in 2026. Earn $300-800/month with no coding. 5 proven methods, step-by-step setup, and Pakistan payment integration.

item.title: How to Earn $500/Month as an AI Prompt Engineer in 2026 — Complete Beginner Guide
item.description: Discover how to earn $500/month as an AI Prompt Engineer in 2026 — no degree, no coding required. Step-by-step guide covering Fiverr, Upwork, PromptBase, and payment methods.

item.title: Make $300 to $400/Month Labeling AI Images: Beginner's to Expert's Complete Guide
item.description: Make $300-400/month labeling AI images. Complete guide for beginners to experts. Remotasks, Appen, Telus explained. Pakistan payment methods included. Step-by-step tutorial.

item.title: AI Video Editing: Zero Investment A to Z Guide 2026
item.description: Learn AI video editing from beginner to expert in 2026. Use free tools like ChatGPT, Gemini, Google Flow AI and CapCut to earn $50–$800/month from home. No investment needed.

item.title: YouTube Niche Selection 2026: Complete Guide for Beginners to Experts
item.description: Master YouTube niche selection with Isabella's complete guide. CPM analysis, competition research, best niches 2026, Pakistan opportunities, and step-by-step selection process with AI prompts.

item.title: YouTube Monetization: Complete Guide to Reaching 1000 Subs & 4000 Hours Fast
item.description: Complete YouTube monetization guide. Reach 1000 subscribers and 4000 watch hours fast. Speed up process, Pakistan payment setup, realistic earnings timeline.

item.title: How I Get 1M Views: YouTube SEO Secret Top Creators Won't Share (Step-by-Step)
item.description: How top creators get 1M views fast? The YouTube algorithm secret they don't want you knowing. Real SEO tactics, proven data, step-by-step blueprint for ANY channel.

item.title: Make $500-2000/Month with YouTube Automation: Complete Beginner's Guide 2026
item.description: Learn YouTube automation to earn $500-2000/month. Complete guide with step-by-step setup, tools, AI prompts, and Pakistan payment methods.
